name: hud_ui_circle_constructor
description: HudUiCircle::Constructor initializes the HudUiElement base and circle radius/color fields.
known_limits: No VC byte target currently covers 0x4bc480, so Binary-safe remains false.
functional_evidence: Binary Ninja assembly and decompilation for 0x4bc480 validate the call to HudUiElement::Constructor(self, x, y), g_HudUiCircle_FTable installation, radius storage, radiusSquared = radius * radius, color565 storage, and return of self.
The native smoke verifies constructor return value, ftable, x/y base initialization, radius, radiusSquared, color565, and the associated circle hit-test behavior.
